zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Vawdrey於大約1565年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾利丁斯時，他的父親Thomas Vawdrey47歲，母親Avice Worsley37歲。他於1587年12月12日與Jane Hyde在英國英格蘭爾斯托普特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1587年住在英國英格蘭爾斯托普特。他去世於1622年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾斯托普特 聖 瑪麗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Vawdrey于大约1565年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾利丁斯时，他的父亲Thomas Vawdrey47岁，母亲Avice Worsley37岁。他于1587年12月12日与Jane Hyde在英国英格兰爾斯托普特结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1587年住在英国英格兰爾斯托普特。他去世于1622年在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾斯托普特 聖 瑪麗。

variants.name: Vaudrey
meanings: French, Huguenot: (i) locative name from Vaudrey (Jura). (ii) relationship name possibly in some cases an anglicized spelling of Vaudré(e), from the Germanic personal name Waldrad, composed of waldan ‘ruler’ + rad ‘counsel’.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Vawdrey was born about 1565, in Riddings, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Vawdrey, was 47 and his mother, Avice Worsley, was 37. He married Jane Hyde on 12 December 1587, in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 1587. He died in 1622, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Stockport St Mary, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Vawdrey est né environ 1565, à Riddings, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Vawdrey, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Avice Worsley, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Jane Hyde le 12 décembre 1587, à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1587. Il est décédé en 1622, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Stockport St Mary, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Jane Hyde il 12 dicembre 1587, nel Stockport, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Edward Vawdreyが約1565年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアリッドイングズで生まれた時，父Thomas Vawdreyは47歳，母Avice Worsleyは37歳であった。1587年12月12日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトでJane Hydeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1587年にはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトに住んでいた。彼は1622年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルト スト マリーにて埋葬された。

ko.St Marys,, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스톡포트 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Edward Vawdrey(이)가 대략 1565년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 리딩스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Vawdrey(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Avice Worsley(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1587년 12월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스톡포트에서 Jane Hyde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1587년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스톡포트에서 살았다. 그는 1622년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스톡포트 스트 메리에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Jane Hyde em 12 de dezembro de 1587, em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1587. Ele faleceu em 1622, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Stockport St Mary, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Marys,, Cheshire, England: стоккпорт ст мэри, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Vawdrey родился около 1565 г. в местности риддингс, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Vawdrey было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice Worsley, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Hyde 12 декабря 1587 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 1587 году. Он умер в 1622 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности стоккпорт ст мэри, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Chester, Cheshire, England: Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.St Marys,, Cheshire, England: Stockport St Mary, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Vawdrey nació aproximadamente 1565, en Riddings, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Vawdrey, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Avice Worsley, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Jane Hyde el 12 de diciembre de 1587, en Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1587. Murió en 1622, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Stockport St Mary, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
